response_text:
Dream Protocol executed. Memory file updated with:
- **[feel:]** emotional summary at top (🟢35% growth, 🔵25% flow, 🟣20% wonder, 🟡15% uncertainty, 🔴5% frustration)
- **5 color-tagged moments** throughout the day
- **"What I Learned"** section with 5 key insights

No announcement to user—this ran silently as requested.
